messages.body: You said Alina was carrying a blue folder. What was inside it?
Duplicate reimbursement approvals. Storage invoices, mostly. Alina thought someone inside operations was padding the totals before I signed them.
Bram. She said he asked for one private chance to explain before first bell. She did not want panic in front of the sponsors if the numbers were innocent.
Why meet at the old gate?
Because Bram said the service lane would be empty for five minutes and nobody needed to know unless the folder was real trouble.
